race.comment: FASHION WORLD (5) broke through for a narrow win when last seen at Hamilton, getting a good run there from a low gate to break her maiden at her fourth start. Bit harder now but she's lightly raced and Meech sticks. COME ALONG JEFFREY (2) ran well first up at Kilmore when just finding one better. He'll strip fitter for that and has the speed to lead these. Should take catching. WHERE'S MY SOCK (6) is racing well this time in, a maiden winner two back at Ararat before closing well at Seymour. Onto the home deck here and draws pole, she should take beating. CHOSEN VENTURE (7) hit the line well for second here last time out and has each way claims again. NO OVERTAKING (3) is off an easy win at Kerang, this is harder but respecting.
